published_title_visible: 22. They find the donation made by Kyle to @usabmxvideos HOF - 1986 Porsche Designs plaque
published_title_evidence_status: transcribed from supplied YouTube Studio screenshot; an ellipsis marks visible UI truncation where present
working_source_title: Fireside BMX Chat w/ Greg Mathias - Greg and Kyle find the donation Kyle made to the National BMX Hall of Fame
working_source_description: Greg and Kyle find the donation Kyle made to the National BMX Hall of Fame - The 1986 Porsche Design Fallnational plaque as won by Harry Leary. Kyle discusses being inspired by Greg’s donation and worked with Gork who was very helpful with information regarding the plaque. Kyle bought the plaque on eBay and when he realized what he had, he realized he had something bigger than himself as a collector.
